message:
fix: rename repo from cross_agent_sessions_resumer to cross_agent_session_resumer

- Fix typo in repo name (sessions → session) across all references
- Update Cargo.toml repository URL
- Update README clone instructions
- Update doc comments, test fixtures, and porting notes
- GitHub repo already renamed via gh CLI

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@ version = "0.1.0"
 edition = "2024"
 description = "Cross Agent Session Resumer — resume AI coding sessions across providers"
 license = "MIT"
-repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/cross_agent_sessions_resumer"
+repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/cross_agent_session_resumer"
 
 [dependencies]
 anyhow = "1"

@@ -91,8 +91,8 @@ Notes:
 ### From Source (Recommended)
 
 ```bash
-git clone https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/cross_agent_sessions_resumer
-cd cross_agent_sessions_resumer
+git clone https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/cross_agent_session_resumer
+cd cross_agent_session_resumer
 cargo build --release
 ./target/release/casr --help
 ```

@@ -57,8 +57,8 @@ These findings were validated against real local provider state in `~/.claude`,
 - Project directory key is a sanitized workspace path:
   - non-alphanumeric characters -> `-`
   - case preserved
-  - example: `/data/projects/cross_agent_sessions_resumer` ->
-    `-data-projects-cross-agent-sessions-resumer`.
+  - example: `/data/projects/cross_agent_session_resumer` ->
+    `-data-projects-cross-agent-session-resumer`.
 - Session file: `<project-key>/<session-id>.jsonl`.
 - `sessionId` in JSONL entries matches the UUID filename used by `claude --resume`.
